input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.10.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.10.1
            TITLE: an add item request must be submitted on the fsae online website to add items to the cost

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.10.1: An Add Item Request must be submitted on the FSAE Online Website to add items to the Cost
S.3.10.1 An Add Item Request must be submitted on the FSAE Online Website to add items to the Cost 
Tables for individual team requirements.

final_answer: An Add Item Request must be submitted on the FSAE Online Website to add items to the Cost Tables for individual team requirements.
